text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, June 15. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
